{{Quote|Ord Canfre surrenders|[[Shadowfeed/Legends|CIS Shadowfeed]]|<ref name="CIS Shadowfeed Dispatch 14:2:14 Edition">{{InsiderCite|65|CIS Shadowfeed Dispatch 14:2:14 Edition}}</ref>}}
The '''Battle of Ord Canfre''' took place in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] forces defeated the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and took over the planet of [[Ord Canfre/Legends|Ord Canfre]].<ref name="TNEC" /> the [[Ailon Nova Guard/Legends|Ailon Nova Guard]] served on the Republic side in the battle and were critical of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] leadership, feeling they were too lenient.<ref name="GaW" />
